utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: all right . this is matthew rogers . date of birth 5/24/2007 . i would like to use the acne follow-up template for him . he is here today for an acne follow-up . at the last visit on 3/3/21 he was prescribed the following : clindamycin lotion , uh , trent- tretinoin cream , 4-5 % benzoyl peroxide wash for f-face and 5-10 % for chest and back . so we're going to enter the room :

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: hi there , how are y'all today ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: good , how are you ?

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: i'm good , thank you . uh , acne doing better ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: yeah .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: excellence , excellent . tell me , uh , what did you do for your skin this morning ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: i washed it with , uh , the benzoyl peroxide and i put the antibiotic thing , and the sunscreen moisture stuff as well .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: perfect . uh , what did you do last night ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: uh , i washed my face with the benzol peroxide , i put , uh , the tret-tret-tretinoin cream , sh-uh sorry i do n't know how to say that , uh , for nighttime and the sunscreen moisture stuff again .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: all right , all right , now have you had any redness , peeling , dryness , or irritation with the use of these medications at all ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: nope . not at all .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: excellent , excellent . and , uh , washing your chest and back with the higher strength benzoyl peroxide wash , is that right ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: uh , no . i did n't get it .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: okay . um , are your chest and back doing okay ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: um , i mean , i have n't put much effort into it because it has n't' really bothered me .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: fair enough . that's all right . um , if it bothers you , that's what , uh , that's why i recommended last time

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: okay .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: um , so as we move into the summer it may be something that you are more interested in pursuing doing that , uh , but if you feel like the acne on your face ... do you feel like the acne on your face is improving ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: yeah . definitely .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: all right , good . good . uh , go ahead and bring your mask down . yeah . yeah . yeah . yeah . that looks good !

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: yeah . it's okay .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: definitely . uh , this is one of the fun parts of covid for me . it's like the mask comes down for my acne patients and it's like a big reveal . this lo- this looks a lot better , like a lot better . uh , i'm just going to take a look at your back and chest real quick . um , i would n't recommend making any changes to what you're doing . uh , i'm happy with how things are going . are you- are you happy with how things are going ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: yeah .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: all right , yeah . if that little bit bothers you , i would use a 5-10 % benzoyl peroxide base . i think that ... i think that what i have using on your face is a 4-5 % . um , usually the back and chest can handle a little , uh , a little something stronger . um , that's the only thing i would think about changing , otherwise it think this looks great .

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: sounds good .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: all right , uh , do you have any questions for me ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: um , i do n't . i'm just going to write that down .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: uh , well you want me to write that down for you on your , uh , checkout sheet ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: uh , yeah . that'd be awesome .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: uh , the one i recommend for the chest and back is the , the PanOxyl 10 % . uh , we actually have samples of it and coupons . so i can send you home with those .

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: cool . that'd be perfect .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: all right , um , so i'm going ahead and tee up a one year prescription for you because at this point i'll want to see you once a year . i want to make sure that you have enough of your medicines , um , and these are going to walgreens on broad ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: uh , yeah .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: okay . um , all right . so the tretinoin , uh , usually lasts patients a couple of months . you probably have n't refilled that , right ?

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: uh , yeah , we did once , i think .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: okay . okay . so i'm going to go ahead and send in a new refill for the clindamycin with 11 refills . and then the tretinoin cream with three refills . uh , that's usually about enough for a year . uh , if you run out though , just let us know . i'm happy to send more . uh , i just need to see you back once a year for your medicine . all right ? your acne printout with steps will be at your checkout sheet . and then here are your samples and coupons .

utterances.speaker: patient
utterances.text: alrighty , thank you .

utterances.speaker: doctor
utterances.text: um , as far as the physical exam . scattered inflammatory papules and pustules across the upper back and posterior shoulders . there are less than 5 inflammatory papules on the forehead , cheeks , and chin . acne vulgaris is improved and well controlled on the face , but there is a mild flare on the back . recommend continuing current treatment plan for the face and initiation treatment with PanOxyl 10 % foaming wash to the back in the shower daily .

detail_list.summary: Matthew Rogers is a 14-year-old male presenting for acne follow-up.
Acne
The doctor asks if the patient's acne is improving.
The doctor asks the patient to describe his morning skincare routine.
The patient uses benzoyl peroxide wash, clindamycin lotion, and sunscreen in the morning.
The doctor asks the patient to describe his evening skincare routine.
The patient uses benzoyl peroxide wash, tretinoin cream, and moisturizer in the evening.
The doctor asks if the patient has experienced redness, peeling, dryness, or irritation.
The patient denies any redness, peeling, dryness, or irritation.
The doctor asks if the patient is using the higher strength benzoyl peroxide wash on his chest and back.
The patient confirms he has not been using the higher strength benzoyl peroxide wash on his chest and back.
The doctor asks how the patient's chest and back are doing.
The patient states he has not put effort into treating his back and chest because it is not bothersome.
The doctor performs a physical exam of the face, noting improvement.
The doctor examines the patient's back and chest.
The doctor asks if the patient is happy with the progress.
The doctor recommends using 10% benzoyl peroxide wash for the back and chest.
The doctor asks if the patient has any questions.
The doctor provides PanOxyl 10% samples and coupons.
The doctor schedules a follow-up visit in one year.
The doctor submits a one-year supply of clindamycin and tretinoin cream.
The doctor summarizes the physical exam findings and the treatment plan.
